debug_info.goal:
H : Type u_1
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup H
inst✝¹ : InnerProductSpace ℂ H
inst✝ : CompleteSpace H
a : H →L[ℂ] H
ha : IsSelfAdjoint a
x y : H
C : ℝ
f : ↑(spectrum ℂ a) → ℂ
hf_bounded : ∀ (x : ↑(spectrum ℂ a)), ‖f x‖ ≤ C
hX : Measurable f
⊢ ‖ComplexMeasure.integral (@cfc_toComplexMeasure H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha x y) f‖ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C

failed_attempts:
let μ := cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y
  by_cases hH : Nontrivial H
  · have : (spectrum ℂ a).Nonempty := spectrum.nonempty a
    obtain ⟨z, hz⟩ := this
    have hC : 0 ≤ C := (norm_nonneg _).trans (hf_bounded ⟨z, hz⟩)
    apply (ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_lintegral_nnnorm μ f).trans
    calc (∫⁻ z, ‖f z‖₊ ∂μ.variation).toReal
      ≤ (∫⁻ z, ENNReal.ofReal C ∂μ.variation).toReal := by
        apply ENNReal.toReal_mono
        · exact ENNReal.mul_ne_top (ne_of_lt (ComplexMeasure.variation_lt_top _ _)) ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top
        · rw [lintegral_const]
          exact lintegral_mono fun z ↦ ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal (hf_bounded z)
    _ = (μ.variation Set.univ).toReal * C := by
        rw [lintegral_const, ENNReal.toReal_mul, ENNReal.toReal_ofReal hC]
    _ ≤ (‖x‖ₑ * ‖y‖ₑ).toReal * C := by
        apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right _ hC
        rw [ENNReal.toReal_le_toReal (ne_of_lt (ComplexMeasure.variation_lt_top _ _)) (ENNReal.mul_ne_top ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top ENNReal.ofReal_ne_top)]
        exact cfc_variation_toComplexMeasure_bounded ha x y
    _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * C := by
        rw [ENNReal.toReal_mul, ENNReal.toReal_ofReal (norm_nonneg x), ENNReal.toReal_ofReal (norm_nonneg y)]
  · have : Subsingleton H := not_nontrivial_iff_subsingleton.mp hH
    simp [eq_iff_true_of_subsingleton]
